---
title: "About - In Progress"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    bootstrap: 5
---

```{=html}

<!-- FULL-WIDTH INTRO -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0">
  <div class="p-5" style="background:#0b1f16; color:white;">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="row align-items-center g-4">
        <div class="col-12 col-lg-7">
          <div class="text-uppercase opacity-75" style="letter-spacing:.08em; font-size:.85rem;">
            action driven
          </div>
          <h1 class="display-5 fw-semibold mt-2"> Welcome! I am Nibia </h1>
          <p class="lead mt-3 mb-0">
            I am deeply committed to accessibility, inclusion, and community building. I bring this passion to my personal and professional life.
            In this section I will highlight some of the experiences that have shaped the way I approach work:
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-12 col-lg-5">
          <img src="Nibia_Profile_Pic.jpg" alt="Nibia"
               class="img-fluid shadow"
               style="width:100%; height:320px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HIGHLIGHT SECTION 1 -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0">
  <div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row align-items-center g-4">
      <!-- TEXT -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
        <h2 class="h3 fw-semibold">Davis Projects for Peace: Prosperidad Partners</h2>
        <p class="mt-3"> I worked alongside three other Latin American women on a project focusing on economic violence prevention. We partnered with Latinx speakers and NGOs to facilitate culturally relevant content, equipping participants with tools to engage in healthier communication in their relationships, as well as strengthen their financial literacy. We named our workshop series Prosperidad Partners. </p>

        <ul class="mt-3">
        Highlights:
         <li>Managed a $10,000 cross-border project with direct impact on ~80 beneficiaries across Peru, Brazil, and the U.S. Latino community, coordinating partners across 3 countries.</li>
          <li>Built bilingual reporting systems and stakeholder coordination frameworks for funders and community partners.</li>
        </ul>

        <div class="mt-4 d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <a href="https://www.macalester.edu/global-citizenship/student-opportunities/davis-projects-for-peace/pastprojects-2/" class="btn btn-outline-dark" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            Macalester Website
          </a>
          <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/16E482tW-o5A9UFDajeBX_7IrRQ5XCOUl?usp=sharing" class="btn btn-outline-dark" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            Final Reports
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      
       <ul class="mt-3">
         
        </ul>

      <!-- IMAGE -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
        <img src="images_about/about_2_Davis_Projects_2024.jpg" alt="(from left to right) Marcela Saavedra, Nibia Becerra Santillan, Olga Gonzalez (Project advisor), Andrea Vigil Morin, and Alessandra Rosa Policarpio. Davis Projects for Peace 2024 Awardees"
             class="img-fluid shadow"
             style="width:100%; height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HIGHLIGHT SECTION 2 (with carousel) -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0" style="background:#f6f7f8;">
  <div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row align-items-center g-4">
      <!-- TEXT -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6 order-2 order-lg-1">
        <h2 class="h3 fw-semibold">Program Assistant at International Student Programs Department(ISP)</h2>
        <p class="mt-3">
        During my 4 years at Macalester College, I was a program assistant at the ISP Office. In this position I planned events, supported training in diverse programing, gave individualize tax reviews for international students, and built essential skills on community building and communication.  </p>
        <ul class="mt-3">
        Highlights:
         <li> Certified tax reviewer for F1-visa students - 4 year VITA/TCE Foreign Student Exam (2021-2024) </li>
          <li> Mentored 16 first year international students across 3 years, part of the ISP mentoring program. </li>
          <li> Lead Pre - Orientation for International Students (PO4IS) two years. PO4IS ensured first year international students could transition smoothly to into their lives in the US. My main role was managing a group of 20-25 facilitators, providing schedules, training, and coordination with professional and student staff. </li>
          <li> Facilitated community-building for international students over four years by leading informal weekly events, initiating conversations with newcomers, and creating connections that encouraged lasting social networks.
          </li>
        </ul>

      <!-- CAROUSEL -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6 order-1 order-lg-2">
        <div id="eventsCarousel1" class="carousel slide shadow" data-bs-ride="carousel">
          <div class="carousel-indicators">
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel1" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active"></button>
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel1" data-bs-slide-to="1"></button>
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel1" data-bs-slide-to="2"></button>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-inner">
            <div class="carousel-item active">
              <img src="images_about/about_1_Peace_Day_2024.JPG" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 1">
            </div>
            <div class="carousel-item">
              <img src="images_about/about_2_Davis_Projects_2024.jpg" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 2">
            </div>
            <div class="carousel-item">
              <img src="images_about/about_3_Peace_Day_2023_attendees.jpg" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 3">
            </div>
          </div>
          <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel1" data-bs-slide="prev">
            <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon"></span>
          </button>
          <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel1" data-bs-slide="next">
            <span class="carousel-control-next-icon"></span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HIGHLIGHT SECTION 3 -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0">
  <div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row align-items-center g-4">
      <!-- TEXT -->
      <div class="col-12 col-md-6 pe-md-5">
        <h2 class="h3 fw-semibold">Event organizing - Across multiple years</h2>
        <p class="mt-3">[Your 4–6 lines here...]</p>
        <div class="mt-4">
          <a href="YOUR_READMORE.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-dark">Read more</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- IMAGE -->
      <div class="col-12 col-md-6">
        <img src="images_about/about_1_Peace_Day_2024.JPG" alt="Event photo"
             class="img-fluid shadow"
             style="width:100%; height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HIGHLIGHT SECTION 4 (with carousel) -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0" style="background:#f6f7f8;">
  <div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row align-items-center g-4">
      <!-- TEXT -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6 order-2 order-lg-1">
        <h2 class="h3 fw-semibold">Fundraiser Coordinator - UWC Peru (Volunteering)</h2>
        <p class="mt-3">[Write 4–6 lines. Emphasize initiative, budgeting, institutional navigation.]</p>
        <div class="mt-4">
          <a href="[optional_link.qmd]" class="btn btn-outline-dark">Read more</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CAROUSEL -->
      <div class="col-12 col-lg-6 order-1 order-lg-2">
        <div id="eventsCarousel2" class="carousel slide shadow" data-bs-ride="carousel">
          <div class="carousel-indicators">
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel2" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active"></button>
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel2" data-bs-slide-to="1"></button>
            <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel2" data-bs-slide-to="2"></button>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-inner">
            <div class="carousel-item active">
              <img src="images_about/about_1_Peace_Day_2024.JPG" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 1">
            </div>
            <div class="carousel-item">
              <img src="images_about/about_2_Davis_Projects_2024.jpg" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 2">
            </div>
            <div class="carousel-item">
              <img src="images_about/about_3_Peace_Day_2023_attendees.jpg" class="d-block w-100"
                   style="height:420px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:0;" alt="Event 3">
            </div>
          </div>
          <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel2" data-bs-slide="prev">
            <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon"></span>
          </button>
          <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCarousel2" data-bs-slide="next">
            <span class="carousel-control-next-icon"></span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="container-fluid px-0" style="background:#0b1f16; color:white;">
  <div class="container py-5 text-center">
    <h2 class="h3 fw-semibold">Want to work together?</h2>
    <p class="opacity-75 mb-3">[One friendly line: what kinds of roles/collabs you’re open to.]</p>
    <a class="btn btn-light" href="mailto:nibiab.work@gmail.com">Reach out</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
